report.implementation_summary: Added governed Codex execution report submission through taskctl and aictl, with strict JSON validation, separate report state/events, Web read-model exposure, prompt guidance, and regression tests.

checks.name: Python compile
checks.command: python -m py_compile scripts/taskctl.py scripts/aictl.py ai_project_ctl/core/registry.py ai_project_ctl/web/read_model.py

checks.name: Focused unit tests
checks.details: Registry, facade, report submission, and Web read-model tests passed.

checks.name: Project doctor
checks.details: Project doctor reported 13 PASS, 0 WARN, 0 FAIL.

checks.name: Documentation validation
checks.details: Command exited successfully with pre-existing documentation status/hash warnings.

warnings: python -m unittest discover from the repository root found no tests; reran with -s tests and all discovered tests passed.
docctl validate reported pre-existing documentation registry/status/hash warnings but exited OK.
notes: The report command stores data in AI_PROJECT/state/task_reports.json and AI_PROJECT/events/task-report-events.jsonl through the governed CLI only.
Submitting a report does not modify tasks.json and does not approve, close, or transition the task.

notes: The report command stores data in AI_PROJECT/state/task_reports.json and AI_PROJECT/events/task-report-events.jsonl through the governed CLI only.

report.implementation_summary: Added a Task Review Packages view to the Web Control Center /reviews page, combining task metadata, linked Evolution Change status, latest Codex execution report details, checks, changed files, warnings, blockers, notes, and governed owner decision controls.

checks.name: task validation
checks.command: python scripts/taskctl.py validate && python scripts/taskctl.py check-generated

checks.name: evolution validation
checks.command: python scripts/evolutionctl.py validate && python scripts/evolutionctl.py check-generated

notes: Review decision forms still require confirmation and owner notes.
The default python -m unittest discover command found zero tests in this repo, so explicit discovery with -s tests was used and passed.
Report submission itself is expected to write AI_PROJECT/state/task_reports.json and AI_PROJECT/events/task-report-events.jsonl through the governed CLI.
